'''Sone''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Clawdite]] and the daughter of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] and an [[Unidentified Clawdite|unidentified]] [[Gender/Legends|male Clawdite]] she met on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Denon/Legends|Denon]]. She disappeared shortly after her mother's [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Scum and Villainy" />
